notes: Step 1.5 — lz-string persistence for Master parser. Vendors lz-string v1.5.0 (vendor/lz-string.min.js, ~5 KB). Adds PHANTOM_MASTER_STORE wrapper (save/load/clear) over key 'phantom_master_v1' with QuotaExceededError guard. After phantom_parseMaster returns, the result is JSON-stringified and lz-string compressToUTF16-encoded into localStorage. On cold boot, the warm-store hydration IIFE decompresses and stashes window._lastPhantomMaster so Step 2's Site Reference surface (TBD) can render without a file-picker round trip. Step 1.5 scope persists racksByCab + metadata only — hosts/cables remain in-memory; schema v2 will reconsider. EDP parser, BOM parser, deploy_* code, Ghost Echo: untouched.
